    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Administrator
    Represents system administrator.
    AdminRepo
    In-memory admin repository.
    AppContext
     
    Appointment
     
    AppointmentManagementService
    Service responsible for managing existing appointments.
    AppointmentRepo
     
    AppointmentRuleEngine
    Rule engine used to validate appointments against a set of business rules.
    AppointmentRuleStrategy
     
    AppointmentStatus
     
    AppointmentType
     
    AuthenticationService
    Handles login and logout logic.
    BookingService
    Service responsible for booking appointments.
    DurationRuleStrategy
     
    EmailNotificationService
     
    EmailService
     
    InvalidAppointmentException
    Thrown when appointment violates business rules.
    Main
     
    MockNotificationService
     
    NotificationService
     
    ParticipantRuleStrategy
     
    ReminderService
    Service responsible for sending appointment reminders.
    Schedule
    Manages appointment time slots.
    ScheduleService
    Handles appointment slot operations.
    TimeSlot
    Represents appointment time slot.
    TypeBasedRuleStrategy
     
    UnauthorizedActionException
    Thrown when user tries to perform unauthorized action.
    User
    Represents a system user.
